title: I'm Finally Back From the Fantasy World of Granbahamal After 17 Long Years!
overview: Takafumi’s uncle wakes up from a 17-year coma, claiming he was in another dimension, and he tries to prove it by showing off his magical powers.

title: "Guardian Heroes" Shoulda Been Number One!
overview: Takafumi surprises his uncle with an early birthday present. As the new year begins, Takafumi bumps into a childhood friend.

title: I'm Your Un—...Aunt, Dear
overview: While Takafumi and his uncle strategize on how to increase their YouTube subscriber count, Fujimiya is worried about the well-being of her crush.

title: You Helped Me Through Tough Times
overview: Fujimiya tries to catch Takafumi’s attention. Takafumi’s uncle shares a seemingly romantic memory he experienced during his time in the other dimension.

title: That Reminds Me, I Almost Got Assassinated Once
overview: Takafumi’s uncle has a flashback to the time he narrowly escaped an assassination attempt — and his story keeps getting grimmer.

title: So They Threw Me Into the Basement of a Freak Show...
overview: Even Takafumi’s uncle has memories he’d rather forget. But he also remembers a rare heroic moment he experienced in the other dimension.

title: As You Can See, Sega Games Are Very Helpful in Life!
overview: Takafumi’s uncle recalls the time he almost made friends in the other dimension. Meanwhile, Fujimiya heads to her college campus to meet someone.

title: I Got Through It by Transforming Into the Most Powerful Being I Know
overview: Takafumi’s uncle continues his story about his search to find the Shining Crusader, revealing a thoughtful side to him — almost like a real hero.

title: The Ice Spirit Demands a Price for Its Cooler Magic
overview: Stuck in an apartment without air conditioning in record breaking heat, Takafumi’s uncle negotiates with the Ice Spirits for help.

title: Civility Only Comes After You're Seen as a Person
overview: Worried that Fujimiya is hanging out with the wrong crowd, her friend from college comes to visit her at Takafumi’s apartment.

title: N-no, I Wasn't Looking at Anything Dirty...
overview: Unable to wield his powers, Takafumi’s uncle finds himself helpless against magic-sealing birds. Later, he has a heart to heart with Alicia.

title: Names Are Important, That's What (He/She) Said
overview: Takafumi’s uncle reminisces about the time he was tasked with hunting down a mysterious singing demon. Meanwhile, he longs to find his way home.

title: It's Thanks to All of You
overview: Up against the legendary venom dragon, Takafumi’s uncle and his cohorts feel hopeless — until Elf comes up with an ingenious plan. Let the battle begin!
